properties.name: Indo-Gangetic Humid Subtropical
properties.description: A high-productivity belt with warm summers, cool winters, and dependable irrigation demand. Ideal for year-round monitoring and density-sensitive crops.
properties.season: Peak growth: monsoon to early winter
properties.temperatureTrend: Warmer nights and hotter pre-monsoon peaks are increasing heat stress across the belt.
properties.rainfallChange: Rainfall is arriving in heavier bursts with longer dry gaps between events.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Wetland grasses and riparian species are losing reliable seasonal moisture cycles.
properties.cropImpact: Wheat, rice, and sugarcane face greater irrigation demand and pest pressure.

properties.name: Northwest Arid
properties.description: Hot, dry, and highly evaporative. Irrigation, shade load, and water-use efficiency drive successful cultivation.
properties.season: Best window: winter and early spring
properties.temperatureTrend: Heatwaves are lasting longer and arriving earlier in the season.
properties.rainfallChange: Monsoon rainfall is more erratic, with shorter bursts and longer dry spells.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Desert shrubs and dryland flora are under stronger moisture stress.
properties.cropImpact: Millets, cotton, and cumin require tighter irrigation scheduling and shade management.

properties.name: Central Semi-Arid Plateau
properties.description: Interior plateau conditions with strong afternoon heat, scattered rainfall, and pronounced day-night swings.
properties.temperatureTrend: Daytime heat is rising faster than night-time cooling can recover.
properties.rainfallChange: Monsoon onset is less predictable and rainfall spacing is becoming inconsistent.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Dry deciduous habitats are shrinking under repeated heat and moisture stress.
properties.cropImpact: Pulses, soybean, and groundnut yields are becoming more variable year to year.

properties.name: Western Coastal Tropical
properties.description: Humidity-rich maritime air moderates temperatures but increases fungal pressure, fog events, and rapid canopy response.
properties.temperatureTrend: Warmer sea breezes and humid nights are increasing physiological stress.
properties.rainfallChange: Monsoon bursts are becoming stronger, raising flood and runoff risk.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Mangrove edges and coastal species face salinity and storm pressure.
properties.cropImpact: Spices, coconut, and banana face fungal pressure and cyclone damage.

properties.name: Eastern Coastal Tropical
properties.description: Warm coastal plains with monsoon exposure, strong humidity swings, and a long warm season for fast-growing crops.
properties.season: Primary growth: monsoon and shoulder months
properties.temperatureTrend: Longer warm seasons are increasing pest and disease windows.
properties.rainfallChange: Rain is swinging between flood-producing bursts and delayed monsoon onset.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Delta wetlands and coastal forests are under growing salinity intrusion.
properties.cropImpact: Paddy and vegetables face flood, salinity, and disease stress.

properties.name: Northeast Humid Highlands
properties.description: A wet, cloud-prone zone with steep terrain, fast drainage, and high biomass turnover.
properties.season: Stable growth through most of the year
properties.temperatureTrend: Even small warming shifts cloud cover, mist, and cooling cycles.
properties.rainfallChange: Heavier rainfall events are more concentrated, raising erosion and landslide risk.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Highland forests are sensitive to habitat compression and slope instability.
properties.cropImpact: Tea and horticulture need stronger drainage and disease control.

properties.name: Himalayan Cold Zone
properties.description: High-altitude conditions with strong radiation, cold nights, and short but intense growing windows.
properties.season: Short summer window with snow-driven storage constraints
properties.temperatureTrend: Cold-season duration is shortening while snowlines are shifting uphill.
properties.rainfallChange: Precipitation is becoming more seasonal and snowpack stability is falling.
properties.nativePlantImpact: Alpine meadows and cold-adapted species are shifting upslope or contracting.
properties.cropImpact: Apples and temperate crops face frost, water, and phenology shifts.
